creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 197730
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Version 1.6.30 was appeared in 2018-09-28.
There is no program code change. Only the ppd files were added.

ET-2710 Series was added in 1.6.22 (2018-07-02).
L3150 Series was added in 1.6.23 (2018-08-01).
XP-7100 Series was added in 1.6.24 (2018-08-30).
EP-711A Series, EP-811A Series and L3100 Series were added in 1.6.25 (2018-09-0?) or 1.6.26 (2018-09-06).
ET-M1100 Series, L7160 Series and M1120 Series were added in 1.6.27 (2018-09-??) or 1.6.28 (2018-09-10).
ET-M1120 Series and M1100 Series were added in 1.6.29 (2018-09-14).
PX-S170T Series and PX-S170UT Series were added in 1.6.30 (2018-09-28).
